purpose: Repo-local OS Abyss artifact bundle input for generated/summary_surface_catalog.min.json.

consumer_contract.consumer_expectation: Stats consumers select a derived_observability_readmodel_catalog bundle from the registry latest read-model only after ABI verification, SBOM-lite subject inventory, durable evidence promotion, materialized subject-store verification, source/trust-root matching, build_views --check, validate_repo, and surface-strength boundary checks pass.

consumer_command: abyss-machine artifacts evidence-promote BUNDLE_DIR --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --lifecycle-state release-ready --consumer-ref aoa-stats:summary-surface-catalog --evidence-ref BUNDLE_DIR/artifact.verify.json --source-repo aoa-stats --source-ref manifests/artifact_bundles/summary_surface_catalog.bundle.json --producer aoa-stats-summary-surface-catalog-builder --trust-root-mode host_managed --json

abyss-machine artifacts materialize-subjects BUNDLE_DIR --store-root SUBJECT_STORE_ROOT --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --manifest manifests/artifact_bundles/summary_surface_catalog.bundle.json --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-stats --trust-root-mode host_managed --json

abyss-machine artifacts trust-gate --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class derived_observability_readmodel_catalog --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-stats --trust-root-mode host_managed --subject-digest SUBJECT_DIGEST --json

abyss-machine artifacts registry-latest --registry-dir REGISTRY_DIR --artifact-class derived_observability_readmodel_catalog --consumer-intent agent --source-repo aoa-stats --trust-root-mode host_managed --json
